content:
Introduction It's an Unfortunate Event but it has happened, I have Installed Windows 10 😔. Destroying all my FOSS Principles, I installed this Proprietary piece of Software. Just for all of the Normies who will be reading these Blogs 😢, also to see how an Optimized Version of Windows works in Comparision to Linux 😅.
Linux For an entire Year I was using Linux 😇, What a Beautiful Experience, Hoping through Operating Systems, Optimizing it according to my needs and then Hoping on to other just to Explore the Beauty 👍. I know, I am Pathetic 😅. It all started with Elementary OS then the All mighty Ubuntu, Kubuntu, Tiny Core, Xubuntu, Arch, Linux Mint and many more. During this Adventure I have accuired tons of Knowledge about Softwares, Hardware and Operating Systems 🤓.
Now What ? Now After Installing Windows, I will try to Optimize it 🙂. I will try to reduce its Resource Usage, Customize its UI and try to use a Suite of Free and Open Source Application to Increase Productivity and Conncetivity between Devices.
Windows Installation Process After I made a Bootable USB of Windows 10 💻, I plugged it in the USB Port and went into the Boot Menu, Selected the USB the Installation is very Easy and Basic. Kudos to Microsoft for that 🙌, I didn't connect to the Internet. So, I didn't signed into my Microsoft Account. My Product Key was already present in my Hard Disk 💾 as a System Reserved Partition created by My Laptop's Manufacturer. I also Disabled all the Access required by Microsoft to mine ⛏ my Data to "Improve itself" 🤔.
Conclusion Try not to hand over your data to those Capitalist Companies that's it.
title: Installing Windows

content:
Introduction Grocery Shop Management System is a Software made to ease the management of a Grocery Shop and assists in keeping logs of Products, Customers, Inventory, and Bills. This Software can run on most CPUs, Its deployment is easy, and the UI is CLI based.
Programs used It uses Python for Menu, Data Input, and to print the Output of the Data, and MySQL is used to store the Data entered. MySQL Connector/Python is also used to Integrate Python and MySQL. Basic knowledge of Python was used while Coding the Project.
Deployement The Deployment process is very Easy, Considering you have installed Python, MySQL and MySQL Connector/Python ( If not click on each Software to See Installation Guides ). Git Clone the Repository via Terminal, with this Command.
git clone https://github.com/VighneshNilajakar/Grocery_Shop_Management_System.git After Cloning, Open INITIALIZATION.py and run it. either you can run it with a Text Editor or from The Terminal.
CAUTION : This Script clears all Data from the Database, If it already Exists.
python3 /path/to/file/Grocery_Shop_Management_System/INITIALIZATION.py Enter 'Y' or 'y if you want to run the Script, Add your MySQL Username and Passwords, and It will create all necessary Databases.
Similarly, Run MAIN.py with a Text Editor or in Terminal with this code.
python3 /path/to/file/Grocery_Shop_Management_System/MAIN.py After you Sign Into MySQL with your Credential, The CLI-based Menu is pretty clear and you can use it to maintain Product Data, Customers Data and Manufacturers Data.
Conclusion This Project isn't Fully Developed, It needs some Tweaks and Bug Fixes. It cannot be Deployed in the Real World with its Current State. No Plans for Further development are made and If you want to use this System for your Buisness, Please Consider Contacting me.
description: A Software to manage A Grocery Shop.
title: Grocery Shop Management System

content:
Introduction Super Steve is a Minecraft Parody, which I made after watching the CS50 Lecture.
Programs Used It is made out of Scratch, Which is developed by MIT and is a Simple-UI based Language, Programming is done by code-blocks. People have made some Awesome Projects, I recommend checking them out.
Conclusion With this Experience, I can say Game Dev is Hard! You can review the Project here, or just play it by clicking the Green Flag. Using Arrow keys to Control it via your Keyboard.
title: SUPER STEVE

content:
Hi 👋, I’m Vighnesh from Belagavi, Karnataka and I'm a Student of Bachelors of Engineering in Electronics & Communication at MMEC 💀. As a Technophile and an Optimizer 🤓, I decided to make Blogs and Projects to make Existing Technologies better and more Optimized, This Website will be an Archive of such Blogs and Projects 🙂. I believe in The Free and Open Source Ideology, and want to support it and expand it. I try to practice it as much as possible 🛐. Also, I believe in Minimalism, and that's why I love Optimizing Processes and Hardware. So, That they use lesser Resources. Also, I'm A Solarpunk 🌱.
My Favourite Quote : Once, A Memer said, Life is a meme, Either you can laugh it off, or get Offended.
